name: Platformer Saver
description: Unlimited checkpoint save history for platformer levels — auto-save on every checkpoint, pause-menu timeline, and auto-continue from your latest save.

show-save-notifications.name: Save notifications
show-save-notifications.description: Show a notification when the game is saved (auto or manual).

show-continue-notification.name: Continue notification
show-continue-notification.description: Show a notification when auto-continuing from your latest save.

confirm-load-truncate.name: Confirm load truncate
confirm-load-truncate.description: Ask for confirmation before deleting newer saves when loading an older save.

save-history-sort.name: Newest saves first
save-history-sort.description: Show the newest saves at the top of the load history menu.

level-version-warning.name: Updated level version warning
level-version-warning.description: Show a warning when opening a save file that was updated from a previous version of the level.

psf-version-warning.name: Updated save file warning
psf-version-warning.description: Show a warning when opening a save file that was updated from a previous Platformer Saver version.
